selection_notes.catalog_entry_proxy: TES energy centroid plus selected eplus annihilation-to-TES line from SIM CC/IA records; not a full geometric boundary-crossing replay

current_pointing_policy.zenith_frame: FarFieldAreaSource theta/phi bins remain in global zenith coordinates
current_pointing_policy.implementation: whole detector mass model is tilted through InstrumentFrame.Rotation 0 45 0

current_like_side_region_check.definition: old final prompt eplus TES centroid inside current final prompt eplus 10-90% global x and z envelope

direction_filtered_eplus_prompt_final.definition: selected final prompt eplus events filtered by dot(annihilation_to_TES_unit, current_side_incoming_axis) >= threshold

forced_current_side_axis_subsets.definition: selected final prompt eplus events with annihilation-to-TES unit vector dot current side-axis >= threshold

window_vs_nonwindow_current_eplus_prompt.definition: current final prompt eplus 511 proxy line from annihilation point to TES energy centroid, transformed to current local side-entry frame; window hit if line intersects x-disc window within r=1.898 cm

old_new_geo_re_current_side_region_block.definition: old new_geo_re material on the current v3p5 side-entry axis y=0,z=-5.2 cm, approximated as horizontal side line through the old upright geometry
old_new_geo_re_current_side_region_block.old_true_windows: old optical/window stack is axial/top along +z with r=1.898 cm; it is not on this side axis
